channel.title: Aditya Singh Bhau | Enterprise AI & HR Technology
channel.description: Practical insights on enterprise AI, AI agents, HR technology, chatbots and digital transformation.

item.title: Knowledge Management Is the Real Foundation of Enterprise AI
item.description: Everyone wants AI agents; nobody wants to fix the knowledge base. Lessons from leading Knowledge & AI content migration for a global ServiceNow HRSD transformation.

item.title: How We Reduced Unresolved Chatbot Queries by 84%: A Practical Playbook
item.description: A step-by-step look at the improvement system behind an 84% reduction in unresolved chatbot utterances for a global workforce, and how to apply it to your own virtual assistant.

item.title: What Enterprise Leaders Get Wrong About AI Agents
item.description: AI agents are the most hyped technology in the enterprise right now. After deploying conversational AI for global workforces for over a decade, here are the mistakes I see leaders repeat, and what to do instead.
